description: Network-template pharmacies — services fetched from brand/network pages and directories

competitors.name: BH Pharmacy (Remedy'sRx)
competitors.address: 1300 Finch Ave W, Unit 29, North York, ON M3J 3K2
competitors.raw_service_text: Prescriptions (common conditions, long-term conditions, medication safety, prescription renewals); Vaccinations (flu shot, travel vaccines); Assessments & Monitoring (diabetes, cardiovascular, respiratory); Medication Customization (therapy adjustment, personalized medication, blister pack packaging); Wellness Consultations (travel health, maternity/pregnancy, smoking cessation); MedsCheck appointments; COVID-19 antiviral prescribing (Paxlovid); free local prescription delivery; Sharps Disposal Program; DIEM Health mobile app/telemedicine; loyalty program; online prescription records; wheelchair accessible; ODB coverage.
notable_services: DIEM Health digital platform for prescription records and refills
competitors.pricing_notes: Dispensing fee plus medication costs; prescribed medications may be covered by OHIP/ODB. Blister packaging at no extra cost. Free delivery.

competitors.name: Wellcare Pharmacy (Guardian/IDA)
competitors.raw_service_text: Prescriptions (common conditions, long-term conditions, medication safety, prescription renewals); Vaccinations (respiratory, routine, travel immunizations); Assessment and monitoring (diabetes, cardiovascular, respiratory); Medication customization (therapy adjustment, personalized medications, blister pack packaging); Wellness consultations (travel health, maternity/pregnancy, smoking cessation); MedsCheck appointments; free prescription delivery; Sharps Disposal Program; Option+™ private label products; loyalty program; partially accessible; languages: English, Cantonese Chinese, Italian, Vietnamese.
competitors.pricing_notes: Dispensing fee plus medication costs; OHIP/ODB may cover. Blister packs at no extra charge. Free delivery. Partially accessible facility.

competitors.name: Nor-Arm Pharmacy (I.D.A.) — 1280 Finch Ave W
competitors.address: 1280 Finch Ave W, Unit 107, Toronto, ON M3J 3K6
competitors.raw_service_text: General pharmacy; basic home health care supplies; medication placed in blister packs at no extra cost; free delivery for prescription medication; free seasonal flu vaccine; vaccinations and injections (prescription must be filled there); certified diabetes educator available for consultations; treatment for common ailments (rashes, pink eye, acne, UTIs); COVID-19 antiviral treatment (Paxlovid) prescribing; MedsCheck appointments for prescription reviews; smoking cessation program (ODB recipients); Medication Return Program; Sharps Disposal Program. Wheelchair accessible. Languages: English, Gujarati, Spanish.
competitors.pricing_notes: Dispensing fee plus medication costs; OHIP/ODB may cover. Blister packs at no extra charge. Free delivery. Wheelchair accessible.

competitors.name: Pharmasave / Keele & Finch Compounding Pharmacy
competitors.address: 1275 Finch Ave W, Unit 102, North York, ON M3J 2G5
competitors.raw_service_text: Compounding pharmacy; home health supplies; medication placed in blister packs at no extra cost; free delivery of prescription medication; vaccination administration and free seasonal flu vaccine; MedsCheck appointments for complex prescriptions; certified diabetes educator available for consultations; smoking cessation assistance (ODB recipients); treatment for common ailments (rashes, pink eye, insect bites, acne, UTIs); Medications Return Program; Sharps Disposal Program; walk-in clinic co-located within pharmacy. Wheelchair accessible. Languages: English, Hindi, Portuguese, Spanish, Tagalog, Vietnamese. Owner: Richard Rizk (Pharmacist).
notable_services: Broadest multilingual support of all Tier 2 competitors (6 languages)
competitors.pricing_notes: Dispensing fee plus medication costs; OHIP/ODB may cover. Blister packaging and delivery both free. Wheelchair accessible.

competitors.name: Walmart Pharmacy — Keele St (North York)
competitors.address: 3757 Keele St, Toronto, ON M3J 1N4 (Walmart Supercentre)
competitors.raw_service_text: General pharmacy; home health care supplies; blister pack medication organization at no extra charge; complimentary seasonal influenza vaccination; blood pressure monitoring kiosk; travel health consultations; certified diabetes educator (CDE) available for consultations; free naloxone overdose response kits; treatment for common ailments (rashes, pink eye, insect bites, acne, UTIs); COVID-19 antiviral prescribing (Paxlovid); MedsCheck appointments for prescription review; smoking cessation program (ODB recipients); Medication and sharps disposal programs. Wheelchair accessible. Languages: English, Tagalog. Extended hours including evenings and weekends.
notable_services: Extended hours (open until 10pm weekdays, Sundays open)
competitors.pricing_notes: Dispensing fee plus medication costs; OHIP/ODB may cover. Blister packs at no extra charge. Naloxone kits free. No delivery noted.
